extension.name: Repository Index
extension.description: Generate index of your repo for overview, architecture and module
extension.author: Yiyu Liu

commands.name: speckit.repoindex.overview
commands.description: Generate overview (project technology, architecture overview, get start of a repository

commands.name: speckit.repoindex.architecture
commands.description: Generate deep architectural analysis of software repositories, providing comprehensive documentation covering project structure, core components, dependencies, and performance considerations etc.

commands.name: speckit.repoindex.module
commands.description: Generate  deep analysis of individual modules within a software repository. It examines module-specific business scenarios, technical components, workflows, APIs, data models, and external dependencies。
